zh: 【裁剪】作废领用申请
en: [Cutting Dept] Invalidate Requisition Application

zh: 说明：状态是【待领用】的时候可以作废，【已领用】状态无法作废；作废前先联系面料仓库保管员，删除领用出库单，否则申请人无法作废；当仓库删除后，再点击【作废】，系统会提示作废成功
en: Note: The application can be invalidated when the status is [Pending Collection]; it cannot be invalidated in [Collected] status. Before invalidation, contact the fabric storekeeper to delete the requisition stock-out sheet; otherwise, the applicant cannot invalidate it. Once deleted by the warehouse, click [Invalidate] and the system will prompt that invalidation is successful.

zh: 【仓库保管员】审核出库
en: [Storekeeper] Audit Outbound / Stock-out

zh: 根据领用申请单，筛选、勾选需要出库的领用记录，点击【确认出库】
en: Based on the requisition application sheet, filter and check the collection records that require outbound processing, and click [Confirm Outbound].

zh: 确认后状态由 【待出库】 变更为【已出库】，库存自动扣减
en: Upon confirmation, the status changes from [Pending Outbound] to [Outbound] (Stocked Out), and the inventory is automatically deducted.

zh: 【仓库保管员】删除出库单
en: [Storekeeper] Delete Stock-out Sheet

zh: 输入领用单号，点击查询
en: Enter the requisition sheet number and click Query.

zh: 勾选，点击【删除】
en: Check the item and click [Delete].

zh: 【仓库保管员】库存查询
en: [Storekeeper] Inventory Inquiry

zh: 相同的款号、色光、面料品质、批次的库存量合并显示，点击【库存量】，可以查看具体的布卷明细
en: Inventory quantities with the same Style No., color shade, fabric quality, and batch are consolidated and displayed. Click [Inventory Quantity] to view detailed fabric roll breakdowns.

zh: 可以看到当前剩余库存是给哪些大货订单使用的
en: You can see which bulk orders the current remaining inventory is reserved for.

zh: 【仓库保管员】移库
en: [Storekeeper] Stock Transfer

zh: 勾选需要移库的布卷信息，点击【批量移库】
en: Check the roll details that need to be transferred, and click [Batch Stock Transfer].

zh: 选择新的库位，点击【确认移库】
en: Select the new bin location and click [Confirm Stock Transfer].

zh: 6.2 退零料出入库管理
en: 6.2 Leftover Material Inbound and Outbound Management

zh: 【仓库保管员】新增入库信息
en: [Storekeeper] Add Inbound Information

zh: 支持新增入库，编辑，删除，确认入库，导出操作
en: Supports actions such as add inbound, edit, delete, confirm inbound, and export.

zh: 点击【新增】
en: Click [Add]

zh: 点击【选单】
en: Click [Select Document]

zh: 勾选已入库的物料信息，点击【确认】
en: Check the warehoused material information and click [Confirm].

zh: 根据车间提供的数据，录入零卷和零布对应的数量，点击【提交】
en: Based on the data provided by the workshop, enter the corresponding quantities of remnant rolls and remnant fabrics, and click [Submit].

zh: 若想要修改入库数量，点击【编辑】
en: If you want to modify the inbound quantity, click [Edit].

zh: 审核无误后，点击【确认入库】，系统自动更新库存数量；注意：已审核入库的数据无法再次修改和编辑
en: Once verified correct, click [Confirm Warehousing] and the system will automatically update the inventory quantity. Note: Audited and warehoused data cannot be modified or edited again.

zh: 【仓库保管员】新增出库信息
en: [Storekeeper] Add Outbound Information

zh: 场景1：当零卷和零布不需要使用了，仓库定期处理售卖后，需要将对应库存进行出库处理，点击【新增出库】
en: Scenario 1: When remnant rolls and remnant fabrics are no longer needed and are periodically sold by the warehouse, the corresponding inventory needs to be stocked out. Click [Add Outbound].

zh: 场景2：当跟单员需要做样衣或者售后的时候，需要用到零卷和零布的时候，仓库需要进行出库处理，点击【新增出库】
en: Scenario 2: When the merchandiser needs remnant rolls and remnant fabrics for sample garments or after-sales support, the warehouse needs to perform outbound processing. Click [Add Outbound].

zh: 勾选需要出库的数据，点击【确定】
en: Check the data to be stocked out and click [Confirm].

zh: 输入本次需要出库的数量，点击【提交】
en: Enter the quantity to be stocked out for this transaction, and click [Submit].

zh: 若出库的数量填写错误，点击【编辑】
en: If the stocked-out quantity was entered incorrectly, click [Edit].

zh: 修改出库的数量后，再次点击【提交】
en: After modifying the stocked-out quantity, click [Submit] again.

zh: 核对无误后，点击【确认出库】，系统自动更新库存数量
en: Verify details are correct, click [Confirm Outbound], and the system will automatically update the inventory quantity.

zh: 【仓库保管员】库存查询
en: [Storekeeper] Inventory Inquiry

zh: 查看目前仓库中还有多少剩余的零卷和零布的数量，督促跟单员定期处理
en: Check the current remaining quantities of remnant rolls and remnant fabrics in the warehouse, and urge merchandisers to handle them periodically.

zh: 6.3 样布出入库管理
en: 6.3 Sample Fabric Inbound and Outbound Management

zh: 【技术科长】新增入库信息
en: [Technical Section Chief] Add Inbound Information

zh: 若样衣订单用到的面料需要和供应商开票结算，则技术科长需要操作入库
en: If the fabrics used for sample garment orders need to be invoiced and settled with the supplier, the Technical Section Chief must perform warehousing.

zh: 点击【新增入库】
en: Click [Add Inbound]

zh: 点击【选单】
en: Click [Select Document]

zh: 选择需要结算的样衣订单，点击【确定】
en: Select the sample garment order to be settled, and click [Confirm].

zh: 系统自动带出物料信息，技术科长录入品名、供应商、采购单价、入库数量、币种、税点，点击【提交】
en: The system automatically brings in the material info. The Technical Section Chief enters the product name, supplier, purchase unit price, inbound quantity, currency, and tax point, then clicks [Submit].

zh: 若正式入库之前，发现录入的数据需要修改，点击【编辑】，修改后再次提交
en: If the entered data needs to be modified before formal warehousing, click [Edit], modify, and submit again.

zh: 核实无误后，最终点击【确认入库】，系统根据入库记录，自动出库，并生成对账验收明细
en: Once verified correct, click [Confirm Warehousing] finally. The system will automatically perform outbound processing based on warehousing records and generate reconciliation acceptance details.

zh: 【技术科长】核实出库信息
en: [Technical Section Chief] Verify Outbound Details

zh: 6.4 辅料出入库管理
en: 6.4 Accessories Inbound and Outbound Management

zh: 【仓库保管员】查看入库记录
en: [Storekeeper] View Inbound Records

zh: 可以根据物料名称、物料编码、供应商来查找入库信息
en: Inbound details can be queried by material name, material code, or supplier.

zh: 【仓库保管员】新增领用申请
en: [Storekeeper] Add New Requisition Application

zh: 点击【新增】
en: Click [Add]

zh: 点击厂编号
en: Click Factory Lot No.

zh: 搜索厂编号—选择还在生产中的服装大货订单——点击【确认】
en: Search Factory Lot No., select the bulk apparel order still in production, and click [Confirm].

zh: 根据生产计划，录入本次需要领用的数量，点击【提交】
en: Based on the production plan, enter the quantity to be collected for this transaction, and click [Submit].

zh: 【仓库保管员】作废领用申请
en: [Storekeeper] Invalidate Requisition Application

zh: 说明：状态是【待领用】的时候可以作废，【已领用】状态无法作废；作废前先仓库保管员需要先删除领用出库单，否则无法作废；当仓库删除后，再点击【作废】，系统会提示作废成功
en: Note: The application can be invalidated when the status is [Pending Collection]; it cannot be invalidated in [Collected] status. Before invalidation, the storekeeper needs to delete the requisition stock-out sheet; otherwise, it cannot be invalidated. Once deleted by the warehouse, click [Invalidate] and the system will prompt that invalidation is successful.

zh: 【仓库保管员】审核出库
en: [Storekeeper] Audit Outbound / Stock-out

zh: 勾选本次出库的物料，再次核实出库的数量，点击【确认出库】，系统自动扣减库存
en: Check the materials for outbound processing, verify the stocked-out quantities once more, and click [Confirm Outbound]. The system will automatically deduct the inventory.

zh: 【仓库保管员】库存查询
en: [Storekeeper] Inventory Inquiry

zh: 输入物料名称、规格型号、款号等，点击【查询】
en: Enter the material name, specification model, Style No., etc., and click [Query].

zh: 点击库存量，能查看出当前库存是给哪个大货订单使用的
en: Click on the inventory quantity to view which bulk order the current stock is allocated to.

zh: 【仓库保管员】移库
en: [Storekeeper] Stock Transfer

zh: 若需要对仓库中的某些物料进行移库，勾选需要移库的物料，点击【移库】
en: If certain materials in the warehouse need to be transferred, check the materials and click [Stock Transfer].

zh: 选择新的库位，点击【确认】
en: Select the new bin location and click [Confirm].

zh: 6.5 成品出入库管理
en: 6.5 Finished Goods Inbound and Outbound Management

zh: 【仓库保管员】审核入库
en: [Storekeeper] Audit Inbound / Warehousing

zh: 根据出货箱单，核实成衣入库的实物箱数，审核无误后，系统点击【确认入库】，系统自动更新库存；若核实箱数不对，联系后道修改出货箱单
en: Based on the shipping packing list, verify the actual number of boxes of finished garments being warehoused. Once audited and correct, click [Confirm Warehousing] in the system, and the system will automatically update the stock. If the verified box count is incorrect, contact the finishing section to modify the shipping packing list.

zh: 【仓库保管员】审核出库
en: [Storekeeper] Audit Outbound / Stock-out

zh: 根据出货通知单，核实成衣需要出库的实物箱数，审核无误后，在系统点击【确认出库】，系统自动扣减库存；若核实的箱数不对，联系跟单员修改出货通知单
en: Based on the shipping advice note, verify the actual number of boxes of finished garments requiring outbound delivery. Once audited and correct, click [Confirm Outbound] in the system, and the system will automatically deduct stock. If the verified box count is incorrect, contact the merchandiser to modify the shipping advice note.

zh: 【仓库保管员】库存查询
en: [Storekeeper] Inventory Inquiry

zh: 输入款号、厂编号、客户代码、出货地等查询剩余库存数量
en: Enter the Style No., Factory Lot No., customer code, shipping destination, etc., to query remaining stock quantities.

zh: 【仓库保管员】移库
en: [Storekeeper] Stock Transfer

zh: 当大货订单的库存，需要变更库存的位置，勾选需要移库的库存，点击【移库】
en: When the inventory of bulk orders needs to change its storage location, check the inventory to be transferred and click [Stock Transfer].

zh: 选择新的库位，点击【确定】
en: Select the new bin location and click [Confirm].

zh: 发票验收
en: Invoice Acceptance

zh: 7.1辅料发票验收
en: 7.1 Accessories Invoice Acceptance

zh: 【仓库保管员】对账验收
en: [Storekeeper] Reconciliation and Acceptance

zh: 根据供应商开具的发票，勾选需要验收的物料，点击【生成对账单】
en: Based on the invoice issued by the supplier, check the materials requiring acceptance, and click [Generate Reconciliation Statement].

zh: 核对本次验收的数量，验收的金额，默认显示的是入库的时候数量和金额，可以修改；
en: Verify the quantity and amount for this acceptance. The quantities and amounts from the warehousing are displayed by default and can be modified;

zh: 录入发票号码、开票金额、税率、无税总金额、开票日期、送货单号；其中开票金额=列表的本次对账金额含税；无税总金额=列表的本次对账金额无税；否则保存失败
en: Enter the invoice number, billing amount, tax rate, total amount excluding tax, billing date, and Delivery Order (DO) number. Specifically, billing amount must equal the current reconciliation amount (tax-inclusive) in the list; total amount excluding tax must equal the current reconciliation amount (tax-exclusive) in the list; otherwise, the save will fail.

zh: 【仓库保管员】打印验收单
en: [Storekeeper] Print Acceptance Sheet

zh: 选择已验收的发票，点击【批量打印】
en: Select the accepted invoices, and click [Batch Print].

zh: 点击【打印】，将验收单和发票拿给财务
en: Click [Print], and hand the acceptance sheet and invoice over to the Finance Department.

zh: 【仓库保管员】作废验收单
en: [Storekeeper] Invalidate / Void Acceptance Sheet

zh: 若验收的数据有问题，或者验收错误，则点击【作废】
en: If there is an issue with the accepted details or if it was accepted by mistake, click [Invalidate].

zh: 7.2 面料发票验收
en: 7.2 Fabric Invoice Acceptance

zh: 【仓库保管员】对账验收
en: [Storekeeper] Reconciliation and Acceptance

zh: 选择样布仓库，勾选需要验收的数据，点击【生成对账单】
en: Select the sample fabric warehouse, check the data requiring acceptance, and click [Generate Reconciliation Statement].

zh: 核对本次验收的数量，验收的金额，默认显示的是入库的时候数量 and 金额，可以修改；
en: Verify the quantity and amount for this acceptance. The quantities and amounts from the warehousing are displayed by default and can be modified;

zh: 录入发票号码、开票金额、税率、无税总金额、开票日期、送货单号；其中开票金额=列表的本次对账金额含税；无税总金额=列表的本次对账金额无税；否则保存失败
en: Enter the invoice number, billing amount, tax rate, total amount excluding tax, billing date, and Delivery Order (DO) number. Specifically, billing amount must equal the current reconciliation amount (tax-inclusive) in the list; total amount excluding tax must equal the current reconciliation amount (tax-exclusive) in the list; otherwise, the save will fail.

zh: 【仓库保管员】打印验收单
en: [Storekeeper] Print Acceptance Sheet

zh: 选择已验收的发票，点击【批量打印】
en: Select the accepted invoices, and click [Batch Print].

zh: 点击【打印】，将验收单和发票拿给财务
en: Click [Print], and hand the acceptance sheet and invoice over to the Finance Department.

zh: 【仓库保管员】作废验收单
en: [Storekeeper] Invalidate / Void Acceptance Sheet

zh: 若验收的数据有问题，或者验收错误，则点击【作废】
en: If there is an issue with the accepted details or if it was accepted by mistake, click [Invalidate].

zh: 出入库明细报表
en: Inventory Inbound/Outbound Detail Report

zh: 8.1 【仓库/财务】面料出入库明细报表
en: 8.1 [Warehouse/Finance] Fabric Inventory Inbound/Outbound Detail Report

zh: 入库明细
en: Inbound Details

zh: 选择好仓库，出入库类型：入库，选择入库时间，点击【查询】
en: Select the warehouse, set inventory flow type to Inbound, select the inbound date range, and click [Query].

zh: 点击【导出】，将当前查询列表导出为execl表格
en: Click [Export] to export the current query list as an Excel spreadsheet.

zh: 出库明细
en: Outbound Details

zh: 选择好仓库，出入库类型：出库，选择出库的时间，点击【查询】
en: Select the warehouse, set inventory flow type to Outbound, select the outbound date range, and click [Query].

zh: 点击【导出】，将当前查询列表导出execl表格
en: Click [Export] to export the current query list as an Excel spreadsheet.

zh: 8.2 【仓库/财务】辅料出入库明细报表
en: 8.2 [Warehouse/Finance] Accessories Inventory Inbound/Outbound Detail Report

zh: 入库明细
en: Inbound Details

zh: 选择好仓库，出入库类型：入库，选择入库时间，点击【查询】
en: Select the warehouse, set inventory flow type to Inbound, select the inbound date range, and click [Query].

zh: 点击【导出】，将当前查询列表导出为execl表格
en: Click [Export] to export the current query list as an Excel spreadsheet.

zh: 出库明细
en: Outbound Details

zh: 选择好仓库，出入库类型：出库，选择出库的时间，点击【查询】
en: Select the warehouse, set inventory flow type to Outbound, select the outbound date range, and click [Query].

zh: 点击【导出】，将当前查询列表导出execl表格
en: Click [Export] to export the current query list as an Excel spreadsheet.

zh: 8.3 【仓库/财务】服装出入库明细报表
en: 8.3 [Warehouse/Finance] Finished Apparel Inventory Inbound/Outbound Detail Report

zh: 入库明细
en: Inbound Details

zh: 选择好仓库，出入库类型：入库，选择入库时间，点击【查询】
en: Select the warehouse, set inventory flow type to Inbound, select the inbound date range, and click [Query].

zh: 点击【导出】，将当前查询列表导出为execl表格
en: Click [Export] to export the current query list as an Excel spreadsheet.

zh: 出库明细
en: Outbound Details

zh: 选择好仓库，出入库类型：出库，选择出库的时间，点击【查询】
en: Select the warehouse, set inventory flow type to Outbound, select the outbound date range, and click [Query].

zh: 点击【导出】，将当前查询列表导出execl表格
en: Click [Export] to export the current query list as an Excel spreadsheet.

zh: 常见问题
en: Frequently Asked Questions (FAQ)

zh: 1.系统访问地址是哪个？
en: 1. What is the system access URL?

zh: 内网登录网址：http://10.62.2.7:4000/login或者 http://10.62.2.32/login
en: Intranet Login URL: http://10.62.2.7:4000/login or http://10.62.2.32/login

zh: 外网登录地址：http://ymapp.goldenteks.com/
en: Extranet Login URL: http://ymapp.goldenteks.com/

zh: 登录账号：工号
en: Login ID: Employee ID

zh: 登录密码：一般都是你们自己设置密码；首次登录初始密码abc.123或者0000；如果忘记密码可以找技术部门重置
en: Login Password: Usually set by yourselves; initial password for first login is abc.123 or 0000. If you forget your password, contact the Technical Department to reset it.

zh: 2.登录之后看不到相关审批/申请等菜单，为什么？
en: 2. Why can't I see the related menus such as Approval/Requisition after logging in?

zh: 可能是相关权限没有，请先确认是否在以下链接开通权限表中。如需开通相关权限，先在以下表格中填好信息
en: It might be due to a lack of corresponding permissions. Please verify whether you are in the following permission activation sheet link. If you need to activate relevant permissions, first fill in your details in the spreadsheet below.

zh: 填好后，打印出来先给部门经理签字——再找采购部经理签字——最后群里拍照片发给管理员
en: After filling it out, print it and get your Department Manager's signature -> then get the Purchasing Manager's signature -> finally take a photo and send it to the Administrator in the group chat.

zh: 3.手机app如何下载？
en: 3. How do I download the mobile App?

zh: 安卓手机在应用手机市场搜索 JLDT即可下载
en: For Android: Search for "JLDT" in your App store to download.

zh: 苹果用户打开app Store 搜索 JLDT——巨联科技即可下载
en: For iOS: Open App Store and search for "JLDT" or "巨联科技" to download.

zh: 手机app登录密码与电脑登录密码一致
en: The mobile App login password is identical to the PC login password.

zh: 4.忘记登录密码怎么办？
en: 4. What should I do if I forget my login password?

zh: 可以钉钉或者微信联系管理员进行密码重置
en: You can contact the Administrator via DingTalk or WeChat to reset your password.

zh: 5.手机app审批时看不到表单信息怎么办？
en: 5. What should I do if I cannot see form details during approval on the mobile App?

zh: 点击我的——>设置——>退出登录，返回app登录页面，重新登录查看
en: Tap Me -> Settings -> Log Out, return to the App login page, and log in again to view.

zh: 6.app点击进入后网络异常怎么办？
en: 6. What should I do if a network exception occurs after entering the App?

zh: 使用公司wifi进行网络连接，并清除app数据。
en: Connect using company Wi-Fi, and clear the App data.

zh: 安卓用户进入 ，设置——>应用设置——>搜索JLDT——>点击【清除数据】
en: For Android users: Settings -> App Settings -> Search "JLDT" -> Tap [Clear Data].

zh: 苹果手机用户
en: For iOS users:

zh: （不同品牌手机，入口稍微有差别）
en: (Entries may vary slightly across different mobile phone brands.)

zh: 终极办法：卸载应用，重新安装
en: Ultimate Solution: Uninstall the application and reinstall it.

zh: 7.如何查看审批驳回原因？
en: 7. How do I view the reason for an approval rejection?

zh: 点击详情再点击流转记录，查看最新审批记录，即可查看驳回原因
en: Click Details, then click Process Flow / Routing History, and view the latest approval record to check the rejection reason.

zh: 如何清除浏览器缓存
en: How to Clear Browser Cache

zh: Google Chrome：打开Chrome浏览器，点击右上角的菜单按钮（三个竖点），选择“清除浏览数据”，在弹出的窗口中选择时间范围等选项，点击“删除数据”按钮。
en: Google Chrome: Open Chrome browser, click the menu button (three vertical dots) in the upper right corner, select "Clear browsing data", select the time range and other options in the pop-up window, and click the "Clear data" button.

zh: Mozilla Firefox：打开Firefox浏览器，点击右上角的菜单按钮（三个横线），选择“选项”->"设置"->“隐私与安全”，点击“清除数据”按钮，在弹出的窗口中点击“清除”按钮。
en: Mozilla Firefox: Open Firefox browser, click the menu button (three horizontal lines) in the upper right corner, select "Options" -> "Settings" -> "Privacy & Security", click the "Clear Data" button, and click "Clear" in the pop-up window.

zh: Microsoft Edge：打开Edge浏览器，点击右上角的菜单按钮（三个横线），选择“设置”->“隐私、搜索和服务”->“清除浏览数据”，选择时间范围等选项，点击“立即清除”按钮。
en: Microsoft Edge: Open Edge browser, click the menu button (three horizontal lines) in the upper right corner, select "Settings" -> "Privacy, search, and services" -> "Clear browsing data", select the time range and other options, and click "Clear now".

zh: 状态
en: Status

zh: 说明
en: Description

zh: 待询价
en: Pending RFQ / Sourcing

zh: 说明当前采购需求，需要采购部进行询比价，询价还未开始
en: Indicates that the current procurement demand requires the Purchasing Department to conduct price comparison/RFQ sourcing, and the sourcing has not yet started.

zh: 询价中
en: Under RFQ / Sourcing in Progress

zh: 说明当前采购需求，需要采购部进行询比价，询价进行中
en: Indicates that the current procurement demand requires the Purchasing Department to conduct price comparison/RFQ sourcing, and the sourcing is in progress.

zh: 已询价待审批
en: RFQ Sourcing Finished, Pending Approval

zh: 说明当前采购需求，需要采购部进行询比价，询价已结束，采购部在审核确认中标的供应商和价格
en: Indicates that the current procurement demand requires price comparison/RFQ sourcing. Sourcing has finished, and the Purchasing Department is auditing and confirming the awarded supplier and price.

zh: 待采购
en: Pending Procurement

zh: 说明当前采购需求，已经有可用的采购价，等待采购员下达采购订单
en: Indicates that the current procurement demand has a valid purchase price available, and is waiting for the Purchasing Specialist to release a purchase order.

zh: 已下单
en: Order Placed

zh: 说明当前采购需求，已经发送采购订单给供应商，等待供应商进行接单
en: Indicates that the purchase order for the current procurement demand has been sent to the supplier, and is waiting for the supplier to accept it.

zh: 待发货
en: Pending Shipment

zh: 说明当前采购需求，已经发送采购订单给供应商，供应商已接单，还未发货
en: Indicates that the purchase order for the current procurement demand has been sent to the supplier. The supplier has accepted the order but has not shipped it yet.

zh: 部分发货
en: Partially Shipped

zh: 说明当前采购需求，供应商部分发货，在系统中创建了送货单
en: Indicates that the supplier has partially shipped the current procurement demand and created a Delivery Order (DO) in the system.

zh: 待收货
en: Pending Receipt

zh: 说明当前采购需求，供应商已全部发货，在系统中创建了送货单
en: Indicates that the supplier has fully shipped the current procurement demand and created a Delivery Order (DO) in the system.

zh: 已入库
en: Received / Warehoused

zh: 说明当前采购需求，保管员已审核入仓，申请人可以打领用单从仓库领取
en: Indicates that the storekeeper has audited and warehoused the current procurement demand. The applicant can print a requisition sheet to collect it from the warehouse.

zh: 已关闭
en: Closed

zh: 说明当前采购需求，因为一些原因被采购员关闭了，不参与后续的采购流程；如果还需要采购，由采购员重新开启
en: Indicates that the current procurement demand has been closed by the Purchasing Specialist for some reason and will not participate in subsequent procurement workflows. If it still needs to be purchased, it can be reopened by the Purchasing Specialist.

zh: 已拒绝
en: Rejected

zh: 说明当前采购需求，在审批的时候被拒绝，无法参与后续的采购流程
en: Indicates that the current procurement demand was rejected during approval and cannot participate in subsequent procurement workflows.

zh: 状态
en: Status

zh: 说明
en: Description

zh: 待检测
en: Pending Inspection

zh: 说明当前物料还未提交检测，待仓库提交
en: Indicates that the current material has not yet been submitted for testing/inspection; pending submission by the warehouse.

zh: 检测中
en: Under Inspection

zh: 说明当前物料仓库已提交检测，正在检测中，当前状态下无法再次提交检测
en: Indicates that the warehouse has submitted the current material for testing/inspection. Inspection is in progress; it cannot be submitted for inspection again in this status.

zh: 合格
en: Passed / Qualified

zh: 说明当前物料检测结果是合格的，能操作入库
en: Indicates that the testing/inspection result of the current material is qualified/passed, and warehousing can be performed.

zh: 不合格
en: Failed / Unqualified

zh: 说明当前物料检测结果是不合格的，不能操作入库；需要通知供应商换货，等货到了后，再次提交检测
en: Indicates that the testing/inspection result of the current material is unqualified/failed, and warehousing cannot be performed. The supplier needs to be notified to exchange the goods. Once new goods arrive, submit for inspection again.
